Headcanons about Griefer having healed scars mentioned in personality.

Griefer’s newly sprouted plant features were supposed to be a cool look— but unbeknownst to either of you yet, they began to affect him in ways no one could have predicted. As a certain season crept in, the changes took root in more than just his appearance. Sleep became harder to come by, his routine fell apart, and he seemed to wither just a little more each day.

With the hero gone on adventures, there was only one person left who could help keep his heat tamed until the season is over — his own friend.
